s3outposts.accesspoint.Bucket.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the S3 on Outposts bucket that is associated with this access point.

s3outposts.accesspoint.Name.Description: The name of this access point.

s3outposts.accesspoint.Policy.Description: The access point policy associated with this access point.

s3outposts.accesspoint.VpcConfiguration.Description: The virtual private cloud (VPC) configuration for this access point, if one exists.
